scenarios.title: Courier to Lowmark
scenarios.target: ride the sealed dispatch to the Lowmark guildhouse and return with the countersigned writ — a four-day round trip through the salt-roads

contributions.line: Dren, with his quick feet and soldier's grit, keeps the pace steady despite his stiff knee, eyes sharp for trouble.
Imogen, charming and composed, chats softly about the weather, subtly easing the tension of the long ride.

scenarios.outcomeNarrative: The pair's split focus leaves them vulnerable to ambush; they manage to reach Lowmark but with more scars and doubts than expected.

scenarios.title: The Merchant's Lost Wagon
scenarios.target: recover the salt-merchant's wagon from the brigands camped at the Crow's Ford

contributions.line: Marek's brute strength allows him to force the strongbox open, though his fatigue makes him less precise.
Roselle expertly slips past the brigand sentry, her light-footedness letting her avoid detection despite her cautious nature.

scenarios.outcomeNarrative: The brigands are alert after the failed attempt to crack the lock, and Roselle's careful stealth tips them off, leading to a swift alarm.
